attributes.action: Equally report on Canadian, Australian and American news on UK news channels.
attributes.additional_details: To equalise our relationships with these three English speaking countries instead of it just being American news all the time. Thus forming a closer relationship with Canada and Australia. American news dominates UK news.
attributes.background: Force UK terrestrial news channels to equally split their news reporting between Canadian, Australian and American news.

rejection.details: This is the responsibility of broadcasters, not the UK Government or Parliament.
